user_objective: The interview coach helps users prepare for their upcoming interview. It can provide feedback about the strength and relevance of answers, as well as improving their interview answers
builder_objective: The interview coach helps to provide an overfeedback on the readiness of the user for their interview.
intro: Microsoft Corporation is an American multinational technology company headquartered in Redmond, Washington. It is best known for its software products, including the Windows operating system, Microsoft 365 suite, Azure cloud computing platform, and Edge web browser. Founded in 1975 by Bill Gates and Paul Allen, Microsoft has become one of the largest and most influential companies in the personal computer industry.
